meta.description: Extracted baseline and steered match rates from all result JSONs

metric_definitions.baseline_specific_pct: % of baseline (unsteered) responses matching concept keywords
metric_definitions.steered_specific_pct: % of steered responses matching concept keywords
metric_definitions.baseline_general_pct: % of baseline responses matching general domain keywords (face/scene)
metric_definitions.steered_general_pct: % of steered responses matching general domain keywords
